posts.author: ClayAndTeaLover92
posts.text: Honestly, I'm done with the constant noise about 'cancel culture' and people getting banned for expressing unpopular opinions on CommonThread. It feels like moderation is just a tool to silence anyone who doesn't fit the corporate narrative these days. The app is becoming an echo chamber where only safe thoughts are allowed.
posts.explanation: This post expresses frustration with platform moderation policies and criticises the environment but does not contain threats, targeted abuse, or harmful false claims; it is therefore appropriate to Approve.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.
